emergency_definition: complete power outages affecting the whole property
electrical fires or smoke from outlets
customers should call 403-870-8494. I personally handle emergency calls after hours

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_protocol: For regular service requests during business hours, same number: 403-870-8494. If nobody answers we call back within 2 hours

non_emergency_routing_rules.message_protocol: For regular service requests during business hours, same number: 403-870-8494. If nobody answers we call back within 2 hours

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I'm unable to connect you right now, but I'll make sure someone gets your message and calls you back as soon as possible.

integration_constraints: We never schedule jobs without customer confirmation
We do not take on jobs outside Calgary and surrounding areas within 50 kilometers
after_hours_flow_summary: For emergencies like complete power outages affecting the whole property, sparking or burning electrical panels, electrical fires or smoke from outlets, and downed power lines on property, customers should call 403-870-8494. I personally handle emergency calls after hours
office_hours_flow_summary: For regular service requests during business hours, same number: 403-870-8494. If nobody answers we call back within 2 hours
questions_or_unknowns: Non-emergency contact phone number not provided
